security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:8765 http://127.0.0.1:8765 ws://localhost:8765 ws://127.0.0.1:8765; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; media-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob:

bundle.shortDescription: AI Meeting Notes — Record, Transcribe, Translate
bundle.longDescription: Scribble is an AI-powered meeting notes app. Record, transcribe in real-time, identify speakers, translate to multiple languages, and generate meeting minutes.
